title: |  TWILIGHT RESONANCE |
description: Collaboration on a vaporwave genre music mod with composer Windows96 and other related artists.
body:
# The Mod has been abandoned. If someone wants to take over and continue the work, feel free to contact me.

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f6a18df222c1cf6de085d0499fd942946d94c0.png)
![Collab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6caf77a470b73656110439762f75da2865d134ff.png)
![LIST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1098308585087361e08979a69dbe9c2f78bc792.png)
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f6a18df222c1cf6de085d0499fd942946d94c0.png)
CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twilight-resonance](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twilight-resonance)
# About:
**Resonance is a vaporwave music mod created in collaboration with composer Windows96 and other artists such as Alt, Komit, Pyxisynth, Sonavision, Nanonovo, Pastel Beach, Lost Odysseas, 5-D and Moondrive to expand the music genre in Minecraft.**
**Each album will showcase various styles, offering a diverse selection of music with themes and meanings.**

# Showcase:

# Features:
**The mod introduces new music from albums released by Windows96 with distinct visual elements. Additionally, it includes new paintings with related themes.**

**Version 1.0.0:**

_- 22 new music discs included one special disc._

_- 10 new paintings._
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f6a18df222c1cf6de085d0499fd942946d94c0.png)
![Showcase Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/784756e5c005f09736dfef01573d237941506b73.png)
( These are albums cover, not paintings )
![LIST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1098308585087361e08979a69dbe9c2f78bc792.png)
![Paintings Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88a3b51f61ca0ff6b1b86a0474b7537a7c9fdfc8.png)
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f6a18df222c1cf6de085d0499fd942946d94c0.png)

# Obtain:
**With version 1.0.0, new music discs can only be obtained through creepers when shot by skeletons.**

# Compatible available:
**- Jukebox from Admenments and Better Jukeboxes: Music Discs being displayed well (Recommend using with)**

# Roadmap:
**- Support older versions: 1.19.2**

# QnA:
-**_"Is Fabric supported?"_**-

**Answer: I'm not sure I have enough time to do but I will consider it in the future**

-**_"Can I use it in my Modpack or use it in my videos?"_**-

**Answer: Feel free to, but please credit or add a Mod link leading to this page.**

-**_"I want this song to be added."_**-

**Answer: You absolutely can, each update will add a song from all available albums as well as a special disc based on votes from the music poll we organize when Resonance are about to have an update. You can join the poll from the main Windows96 server or the project branch at Renion Studio.**

-**_"The music and paintings do not match the style of Minecraft. Music for Minecraft should not have lyrics."_**-

**This is something I came up with, but in case someone asks, here's the answer: Minecraft music is not considered Vaporwave. The mod aims to introduce a new genre of music to Minecraft, not sticking to the game's usual quiet style. The music in the mod is not specifically composed for Minecraft, so having lyrics is acceptable. The paintings have also been adjusted to match Minecraft's art style as closely as possible, so think of them as an extension of the new art and music. Enjoy!**
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f6a18df222c1cf6de085d0499fd942946d94c0.png)

# Credits:

**_A big thank you to the Windows96 and Vaporwave community <3_**
